title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
summary:
The reviewer asks for two changes:

1. **`MergePolicies`**: Fix the nil/non-nil map normalization so that when either input has a non-nil (but empty) `Rules` map, the result preserves that non-nil status instead of silently collapsing it to `nil`.

2. **`RenderPastePipelineINI` tests**: Add a test case that triggers the duplicate-middleware error path, since current tests only cover success paths and leave that error branch uncovered.

code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Changed the guard condition in `MergePolicies` from `len(base.Rules) > 0 || len(override.Rules) > 0` to `base.Rules != nil || override.Rules != nil` in `policy.go:56`, and added a new test case in `policy_test.go` ("both empty-but-non-nil rules preserves non-nil result") that verifies two empty-but-non-nil rule maps produce a non-nil result map.

code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Added a standalone test function `TestRenderPastePipelineINI_duplicateMiddlewareNameReturnsError` in `plugins_test.go` that exercises the error path with two middleware entries sharing the same name ("audit"), asserting that an error is returned containing "duplicate middleware Name" and "audit", and that the result string is empty.

resolution_summary: Both review comments were addressed. The `MergePolicies` function condition was changed from `len()>0` to `!=nil` checks to preserve the nil/non-nil semantic distinction for empty maps, with a corresponding test case added to `policy_test.go`. A dedicated test for the `RenderPastePipelineINI` duplicate-middleware error path was added to `plugins_test.go` to close the coverage gap.
